sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n20357" key="borborokoi/ths" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">βορβορο-κοίτης</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ου</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <title_ TEIform="title">Mudcoucher</title_>, name of a frog, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1220.tlg001:230" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Batr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">230</biblScope></bibl>.</entryFree>
